name: Chinese Egg Fried Rice
description: Classic Chinese egg fried rice with peas, carrot and spring onion. ⭐ Pro Tip: Deglaze with Shaoxing wine and season with white pepper for a refined finish.

instructions.step: (Day-old jasmine rice gives the best fried texture. Cook 300g jasmine rice the day before, spread on a tray and refrigerate uncovered overnight.) Scramble eggs in very hot wok. Set aside.
Stir-fry garlic, ginger, carrot and peas 2 min.
Add rice. Toss on high heat 3 min. Do not stir constantly.
Return eggs. Add soy and sesame oil. Toss.
Serve topped with spring onion.

name: Peking Duck
description: Crispy-skinned roasted duck with pancakes, hoisin and cucumber. ⭐ Pro Tip: Blanch the duck in boiling vinegar-water before drying to achieve a professional crispness.

instructions.step: Score duck skin. Rub with five spice, soy and salt. Air-dry overnight uncovered.
Roast at 200C breast down 30 min, then flip, brush with honey, 40 min.
Rest 15 min. Slice skin and meat separately.
Warm pancakes. Arrange with cucumber strips, spring onion and hoisin.
Let everyone assemble their own wraps.

name: Steamed Fish with Ginger
description: Whole sea bass steamed and finished with hot oil, ginger and soy. ⭐ Pro Tip: Introduce Shaoxing wine for acidity and use an ice bath for scallions to create elegant curls.

instructions.step: Score fish. Fill cavity with ginger and spring onion.
Steam 10-12 min until flesh flakes easily.
Mix soy, sugar and a splash of hot water.
Heat oil in a small pan until smoking.
Arrange fresh ginger and spring onion on fish. Pour hot oil over - it will sizzle. Pour soy mixture over.

name: Beef and Broccoli
description: Tender beef in oyster sauce with crisp broccoli. ⭐ Pro Tip: Finish with toasted sesame seeds and flash-sear the broccoli for superior texture and visual appeal.

instructions.step: Slice beef thin against grain. Marinate in soy, wine and cornstarch 15 min.
Blanch broccoli 2 min. Drain.
Stir-fry beef on high heat 2 min. Set aside.
Stir-fry garlic and ginger. Add oyster sauce and broth.
Return beef and broccoli. Toss. Finish with sesame oil.

name: Dan Dan Noodles
description: Sichuan noodles in chilli oil, sesame paste, minced pork and Sichuan pepper. ⭐ Pro Tip: Replace tahini with stone-ground roasted sesame paste and incorporate preserved mustard greens for authentic complexity.

instructions.step: Cook noodles. Drain.
Brown pork with garlic and ginger. Add soy and Sichuan pepper.
Make sauce: tahini, chilli oil, soy, vinegar.
Divide noodles. Spoon sauce and pork over.
Top with sesame seeds, peanuts and spring onion.

name: Wontons in Chilli Oil
description: Silky pork and prawn wontons bathed in fiery Sichuan chilli oil. ⭐ Pro Tip: Finish the dish with toasted Sichuan peppercorns and a splash of hot oil over the garlic to maximize aromatic impact.

instructions.step: (Use store-bought wonton wrappers, or make from scratch: mix 200g flour, 1 egg and 60ml water, knead until smooth, rest 30 min, roll very thin and cut into squares.) Mix pork, minced prawns, ginger, soy and sesame oil.
Place teaspoon of filling in center of wrapper. Fold and seal into wonton shape.
Boil wontons 4-5 min until they float and are cooked through.
Mix sauce: chilli oil, soy, vinegar, sugar, garlic.
Drain wontons. Toss in sauce. Top with spring onion.

name: Egg Drop Soup
description: Silky strands of egg in fragrant chicken broth - simple and soothing. ⭐ Pro Tip: Introduce Shaoxing wine for complexity and pour eggs through a perforated spoon to achieve professional, uniform silken ribbons.

instructions.step: Bring broth to boil with ginger, soy and white pepper.
Mix cornstarch with 3 tbsp cold water. Add to broth, stir.
Beat eggs. Slowly drizzle into simmering broth while stirring gently to create ribbons.
Remove from heat. Drizzle sesame oil.
Serve topped with sliced spring onion.

name: Sweet and Sour Pork
description: Crispy pork in vibrant sweet and sour sauce with peppers and pineapple. ⭐ Pro Tip: Implement a double-fry method and add a touch of sesame oil for a professional finish.

instructions.step: Cut pork into cubes. Coat in seasoned cornstarch. Deep fry until golden, 5 min.
Stir-fry peppers, onion and pineapple 3 min.
Mix ketchup, vinegar, sugar, soy and 100ml water.
Add sauce to wok. Bring to boil.
Add pork. Toss until coated. Serve immediately.

name: Steamed Baozi
description: Fluffy steamed buns filled with seasoned vegetables or pork. ⭐ Pro Tip: Fold in pork stock aspic for a luxurious mouthfeel and use bleached cake flour to achieve the classic porcelain finish.

instructions.step: Mix flour, yeast, sugar and water. Knead 8 min. Rest 1 hour.
Mix filling: pork, cabbage, soy, sesame, ginger, spring onion.
Divide dough into 16 pieces. Flatten. Fill. Pleat and seal.
Rest buns 15 min on parchment squares.
Steam 15 min.

name: Chinese Hot Pot
description: Table-top hot pot with rich bone broth, thinly sliced meats and vegetables. ⭐ Pro Tip: Add beef tallow and fermented bean paste for authentic depth.

instructions.step: Simmer broth with ginger and garlic. Pour into hot pot.
Slice meats paper thin. Arrange all ingredients on platters.
Each person cooks ingredients in broth at the table.
Mix individual dipping sauces from sesame paste, soy and chilli oil.

name: Ma Po Aubergine
description: Aubergine braised in Sichuan doubanjiang sauce - no meat needed. ⭐ Pro Tip: Introduce Chinkiang vinegar for acidity and finish with homemade chili oil for a glossy, professional sheen.

instructions.step: Cut aubergine. Salt and rest 10 min. Pat dry.
Fry aubergine until golden. Set aside.
Stir-fry doubanjiang, garlic and ginger until fragrant.
Add broth, soy, sugar. Simmer.
Return aubergine. Thicken with cornstarch. Finish with Sichuan pepper and sesame oil.

name: Spring Rolls
description: Crispy deep-fried spring rolls with cabbage, carrot and glass noodles. ⭐ Pro Tip: Incorporate fresh ginger and a dash of Shaoxing wine for authentic complexity.

instructions.step: (Use store-bought spring roll wrappers. Scratch wrappers: mix 150g flour, 1 egg, 300ml water, cook paper-thin in a non-stick pan.) Soak glass noodles. Stir-fry cabbage, carrot, mushrooms and garlic with soy.
Add noodles. Cool filling completely.
Place filling on wrapper. Roll tightly, tucking in sides. Seal with flour paste.
Fry at 180C until golden, 4 min.
Serve with sweet chilli sauce.

name: Hainanese Chicken Rice
description: Poached chicken with fragrant ginger rice, chilli sauce and broth. ⭐ Pro Tip: Implement a 10-minute ice bath post-poaching and rub the skin with salt for a professional finish.

instructions.step: Poach chicken in water with ginger and spring onion 40 min.
Reserve broth. Cook rice in broth with garlic and ginger.
Make chilli sauce: blend chilli, ginger, garlic, lime and chicken broth.
Slice chicken. Serve on rice with broth on the side.
Drizzle sesame oil and oyster sauce. Serve chilli sauce alongside.

name: Scallion Pancakes
description: Flaky, layered pan-fried flatbreads with spring onion. ⭐ Pro Tip: Apply an oil-flour roux inside the layers for superior flake separation and a shatter-crisp texture.

instructions.step: Mix flour with boiling water. Knead until smooth. Rest 30 min.
Roll dough thin. Brush with sesame oil. Scatter spring onion and salt.
Roll up like a cigar. Coil into a spiral. Flatten again.
Pan-fry in oil 3 min per side until golden and crispy.
Cut into wedges. Serve with soy dipping sauce.

name: Twice Cooked Pork
description: Twice-cooked pork belly with cabbage and doubanjiang - a Sichuan classic. ⭐ Pro Tip: Deglaze aggressively to emulsify the oils with the fermented pastes.

instructions.step: Boil pork belly whole 15 min until cooked through. Cool.
Slice thin. Stir-fry in hot wok until curled and slightly crispy.
Add doubanjiang and sweet bean paste. Cook 2 min.
Add garlic, ginger and cabbage.
Deglaze with wine. Add soy and sugar. Toss. Top with spring onion.

name: Cantonese Roast Duck
description: Lacquered roast duck with maltose glaze and five spice. ⭐ Pro Tip: Increase the drying time to at least 24 hours and utilize a vertical roasting rack for superior airflow.

instructions.step: Blanch duck with boiling water inside and out. Air-dry 4 hours.
Mix maltose, vinegar and soy for glaze. Brush all over.
Roast at 200C breast up 60 min, brushing every 20 min.
Rest 15 min.
Chop into pieces. Serve with hoisin and steamed rice.

name: Pork and Chive Dumplings
description: Hand-folded dumplings with pork and garlic chive filling. ⭐ Pro Tip: Finish with a cornstarch lace skirt during pan-frying to achieve a five-star professional presentation.

instructions.step: (Use store-bought dumpling wrappers, or make from scratch: mix 200g flour with 100ml boiling water, knead 5 min, rest 30 min, roll thin and cut into 8cm circles.) Mix pork, chives, ginger, soy, sesame, wine and salt.
Fill and fold wrappers into pleated dumplings.
Boil in batches until they float and cook 1 more min.
Make dipping sauce: soy, vinegar, chilli oil.
Serve immediately.

name: Jook Congee
description: Slow-cooked rice porridge with ginger, century egg and spring onion. ⭐ Pro Tip: Incorporate a splash of Shaoxing wine and a bone-in protein during the simmer to deepen the flavor profile.

instructions.step: Combine rice and broth. Bring to boil. Reduce heat.
Stir occasionally and simmer 50 min until porridge consistency.
Season with soy, white pepper and ginger.
Serve topped with sliced century egg, spring onion, fried shallots and coriander.
Drizzle sesame oil.

name: Long Life Noodles
description: Stir-fried longevity noodles with mushrooms and bok choy. ⭐ Pro Tip: Finish with toasted sesame seeds and micro-greens for visual elevation.

instructions.step: Cook noodles until just done. Drain.
Stir-fry garlic and ginger in hot wok.
Add mushrooms and bok choy. Cook 4 min.
Add noodles. Toss with oyster sauce, soy and wine.
Finish with sesame oil.

name: Sichuan Cold Noodles
description: Chilled noodles in a numbing chilli oil and sesame paste dressing. ⭐ Pro Tip: Replace tahini with stone-ground toasted sesame paste and use Chinkiang vinegar for superior acidity.

instructions.step: Cook noodles. Rinse under cold water until cold.
Toast and grind Sichuan peppercorns.
Whisk tahini, chilli oil, soy, vinegar, garlic, sugar and peppercorns into dressing.
Julienne cucumber. Toss with noodles and dressing.
Top with sesame seeds and spring onion.

name: Chinese Steamed Egg
description: Silky smooth steamed egg custard finished with soy and sesame. ⭐ Pro Tip: Flash-fry the spring onions in hot oil before garnishing to elevate the sensory profile.

instructions.step: Beat eggs with warm broth and white pepper. Strain through sieve.
Pour into bowls. Cover with cling film.
Steam over medium heat 12 min until just set.
Drizzle soy and sesame oil. Garnish with spring onion.

name: Sichuan Braised Peanuts
description: Sichuan-spiced braised peanuts - a classic starter. ⭐ Pro Tip: Incorporate Shaoxing wine and dried tangerine peel to elevate the aromatic complexity to Michelin standards.

instructions.step: Soak peanuts 2 hours. Drain.
Combine all ingredients in a pot. Cover with water.
Simmer 50-60 min until peanuts are tender.
Cool in liquid. Serve at room temperature.

name: Hong Kong Pineapple Buns
description: Soft Hong Kong sweet buns with a crumbly butter-sugar topping. ⭐ Pro Tip: Extend the final proof to 45 minutes and finish with an egg wash for a high-gloss, professional aesthetic.

instructions.step: Make dough: mix flour, yeast, sugar, milk, butter and eggs. Knead 10 min. Rest 1 hour.
Make topping: beat softened topping butter and icing sugar together until pale and fluffy. Mix in egg yolk and flour to form a soft dough.
Divide dough into 12 balls. Place on tray.
Pipe or spread topping in crosshatch pattern.
Prove 20 min. Bake at 190C for 14 min.

name: Stir-Fried Morning Glory
description: Water spinach stir-fry with garlic, oyster sauce and chilli. ⭐ Pro Tip: Deglaze with a splash of Shaoxing wine for aromatic complexity and use peanut oil for a superior smoke point.

instructions.step: Heat wok on highest heat 2 min until smoking. Add oil.
Fry garlic and chilli until fragrant, 30 sec. The wok should be intensely hot.
Add morning glory stems first, then leaves. Toss constantly on very high heat 2 min.
Add oyster sauce, soy sauce and sugar. Toss 1–2 min more until sauce glazes the greens and stems are just tender.
Serve immediately.

name: Cantonese Egg Tarts
description: Cantonese baked custard tarts in a buttery short pastry shell. ⭐ Pro Tip: Lower the oven to 160C to ensure a flat, wobble-perfect custard without doming or browning.

instructions.step: Make pastry: rub butter into flour and icing sugar. Mix in egg yolk. Rest 30 min.
Press into 8 tart tins.
Whisk eggs, sugar, milk, cream and vanilla. Strain.
Fill tart shells. Bake at 180C for 25 min until just set.

name: Steamed Pork Ribs with Black Bean
description: Tender pork ribs steamed with fermented black bean and ginger. ⭐ Pro Tip: Soak ribs in cold water for 20 minutes before marinating to purge impurities for a cleaner finish.

instructions.step: Chop ribs into 3cm pieces. Rinse well.
Mash black beans with garlic and ginger. Mix with soy, sesame and cornstarch.
Toss ribs in marinade. Rest 20 min.
Arrange in single layer in steamer dish.
Steam 20 min until tender.
Top with spring onion and chilli.

name: Pad Thai
description: Stir-fried rice noodles with egg, tofu, bean sprouts and tamarind. ⭐ Pro Tip: Finish with high-quality toasted peanut oil and a high-heat flash fry to ensure a distinct charred aroma.

instructions.step: Soak noodles in warm water 20 min. Drain.
Mix tamarind, fish sauce and palm sugar into sauce.
Stir-fry tofu until golden. Add prawns.
Push to sides. Scramble eggs in center.
Add noodles and sauce. Toss well.
Add bean sprouts. Top with peanuts, spring onion, chilli and lime.

name: Green Curry
description: Aromatic green curry with chicken, coconut milk and Thai basil. ⭐ Pro Tip: Bloom the paste until the oil visibly splits to maximize aromatic extraction.

instructions.step: Fry curry paste in 3 tbsp thick coconut milk 2 min until fragrant.
Add chicken. Cook 3 min.
Add remaining coconut milk, lemongrass and kaffir lime.
Add courgette and bamboo. Simmer 12 min.
Season with fish sauce and palm sugar. Stir in Thai basil.
Serve with jasmine rice.

name: Tom Yum Soup
description: Hot and sour prawn soup with lemongrass, galangal and kaffir lime. ⭐ Pro Tip: Garnish with chili oil droplets to elevate visual presentation and aromatic complexity.

instructions.step: Bruise lemongrass, galangal and kaffir lime. Simmer in broth 10 min.
Add chilli, mushrooms and tomatoes.
Add prawns. Cook 3 min.
Season with fish sauce and lime juice.
Top with spring onion and coriander. Serve immediately.

name: Massaman Curry
description: Rich beef curry with potato, peanuts and warming spices. ⭐ Pro Tip: Extend the braise to 2.5 hours for melt-in-the-mouth texture and toast whole spices before use to unlock essential oils.

instructions.step: Spoon the thick cream from the top of the coconut milk into a hot pan. Brown beef in it. Add curry paste, cook 3 min.
Add remaining coconut milk, potato, star anise and cardamom.
Simmer 40 min until beef is tender.
Add peanuts and onion. Simmer 5 min.
Season with fish sauce, palm sugar and tamarind.
Serve with jasmine rice.

name: Som Tum
description: Green papaya salad with lime, fish sauce, chilli and peanuts. ⭐ Pro Tip: Soak shredded papaya in ice water for 15 minutes to maximize crunch; utilize a premium fermented fish sauce for superior depth.

instructions.step: Pound garlic and chilli in mortar until bruised.
Add dried shrimp and sugar. Pound briefly.
Add papaya, beans and tomatoes. Pound and toss gently.
Season with lime and fish sauce.
Serve topped with peanuts.

name: Red Curry with Duck
description: Rich red curry with roasted duck, lychees and Thai basil. ⭐ Pro Tip: Finish with fresh lime juice and Thai bird's eye chilies to achieve 5-star acidity and heat balance.

instructions.step: Score duck. Pan-roast skin-side down 8 min.
Spoon the thick cream from the top of the coconut milk into a hot wok. Fry curry paste in it 2 min until fragrant.
Add coconut milk and kaffir lime.
Slice duck. Add to curry.
Simmer 12 min. Add lychees and tomatoes.
Season with fish sauce and palm sugar. Stir in basil.

name: Pad See Ew
description: Wide rice noodles stir-fried with egg, Chinese broccoli and soy. ⭐ Pro Tip: Incorporate fermented soybean paste for savory depth and use palm sugar for a richer glaze.

instructions.step: Separate noodles. Mix soy sauces, oyster sauce and sugar.
Stir-fry garlic in very hot wok.
Add chicken. Cook 3 min.
Push to sides. Scramble eggs.
Add noodles and sauce. Toss until noodles are slightly charred.
Add Chinese broccoli. Toss 1 more min.

name: Tom Kha Gai
description: Coconut chicken soup with galangal, lemongrass and kaffir lime. ⭐ Pro Tip: Finish with premium chili oil and micro-coriander to elevate the presentation and provide a contemporary flavor profile.

instructions.step: Bruise lemongrass, galangal and kaffir lime.
Simmer coconut milk with aromatics 8 min.
Add chicken and mushrooms. Cook 10 min.
Season with fish sauce, lime and palm sugar.
Ladle into bowls. Top with coriander and chilli.

name: Mango Sticky Rice
description: Sweet glutinous rice with ripe mango and salted coconut cream. ⭐ Pro Tip: Add toasted mung beans for crunch and salt the coconut cream more aggressively to balance the sweetness.

instructions.step: Soak rice 4 hours. Steam 20 min.
Heat coconut milk with sugar and salt until dissolved.
Pour 2/3 of coconut sauce over hot rice. Stir. Rest 15 min.
Slice mango.
Serve rice with mango. Drizzle remaining coconut sauce and sesame seeds.

name: Larb
description: Minced meat salad with toasted rice powder, lime and fresh herbs. ⭐ Pro Tip: Infuse the poaching liquid with bruised lemongrass and add a pinch of palm sugar to round out the sharp acidity.

instructions.step: Cook pork in a splash of water until just done.
Toast raw rice in dry pan until golden. Grind to powder.
Combine pork with toasted rice, shallots, spring onion.
Season with fish sauce, lime and chilli.
Stir in mint and coriander. Serve with sticky rice and lettuce.

name: Pad Kra Pao
description: Stir-fried minced pork with holy basil, oyster sauce and fried egg. ⭐ Pro Tip: Incorporate a splash of water or broth if the sauce reduces too quickly to maintain moisture without adding fat.

instructions.step: Fry garlic and chilli in smoking hot wok.
Add pork. Stir-fry on high heat, breaking up, 4 min.
Add oyster sauce, fish sauce, soy and sugar. Toss.
Stir in basil until just wilted.
Fry eggs separately, crispy edged. Serve pork over rice topped with fried egg.

name: Khao Soi
description: Northern Thai curry noodle soup with coconut, chicken and crispy noodles. ⭐ Pro Tip: Incorporate toasted coriander seeds and black cardamom into the paste to elevate the flavor profile to elite standards.

instructions.step: Spoon the thick cream from the top of the coconut milk into a hot pan. Fry khao soi paste in it 2 min.
Add chicken. Brown 3 min.
Add remaining coconut milk and 200ml water. Simmer 15 min.
Cook noodles. Fry a handful until crispy for garnish.
Season with fish sauce, palm sugar and lime.
Serve noodles in broth. Top with crispy noodles, pickled mustard, shallots and coriander.

name: Pla Rad Prik
description: Crispy fried whole fish topped with sweet chilli and herbs. ⭐ Pro Tip: Flash-fry the coriander and spring onions to provide a professional, textural garnish.

instructions.step: Score fish deeply. Pat dry.
Deep fry at 180C until very crispy, 10-12 min.
Drain. Fry garlic and chilli in 2 tbsp oil until crispy.
Add fish sauce, palm sugar and lime. Simmer 2 min.
Pour sauce over fish. Garnish with spring onion and coriander.

name: Satay with Peanut Sauce
description: Grilled chicken skewers with turmeric marinade and peanut dipping sauce. ⭐ Pro Tip: Swap breast for skinless thighs and add fresh lemongrass to the marinade for elite aromatic complexity.

instructions.step: Mix turmeric, coriander, cumin and coconut milk. Marinate chicken strips 30 min.
Thread onto skewers. Grill 4 min per side.
Make peanut sauce: blend peanut butter, soy, lime, palm sugar, garlic and chilli.
Serve skewers with peanut sauce and cucumber slices.

name: Nam Tok Beef Salad
description: Grilled beef salad with mint, toasted rice and spicy lime dressing. ⭐ Pro Tip: Ice-bathe shallots to enhance crispness and temper raw pungency.

instructions.step: Grill steak to medium. Rest 5 min. Slice thin.
Toss with mint, coriander, shallots and spring onion.
Dress with fish sauce, lime and chilli.
Sprinkle toasted rice powder. Serve immediately.

name: Yellow Curry with Prawn
description: Mild, turmeric-spiced coconut curry with prawns and potato. ⭐ Pro Tip: Reduce prawn poaching time to two minutes for a succulent texture and add fresh chili for visual pop.

instructions.step: Spoon the thick cream from the top of the coconut milk into a hot pan. Fry yellow curry paste in it 2 min.
Add remaining coconut milk and potato.
Simmer 12 min until potato is soft.
Add prawns and kaffir lime. Cook 4 min.
Season with fish sauce and palm sugar. Serve with jasmine rice.

name: Thai Fried Chicken
description: Crispy fried chicken marinated with fish sauce, garlic and coriander root. ⭐ Pro Tip: Introduce a pinch of palm sugar to the marinade to enhance caramelization and flavor depth.

instructions.step: Pound garlic, coriander root and pepper in mortar.
Mix with fish sauce and oyster sauce. Marinate chicken 2 hours.
Mix cornstarch and flour. Coat chicken.
Fry at 170C until golden and cooked through, 10-12 min.
Serve with sticky rice and lime wedges.

name: Pad Krapao Tofu
description: Thai holy basil stir-fry with firm tofu and vegetables. ⭐ Pro Tip: Switch to vegetarian oyster sauce and finish with a splash of dark soy for color depth.

instructions.step: Press tofu. Cut into cubes. Pan-fry until golden.
Stir-fry garlic and chilli in hot wok.
Add mushrooms and pepper. Cook 3 min.
Add tofu, oyster sauce, soy and sugar. Toss.
Stir in basil. Serve with jasmine rice.

name: Pineapple Fried Rice
description: Thai fried rice with pineapple, cashews, raisins and curry powder. ⭐ Pro Tip: Finish with a splash of lime juice and a pinch of white pepper to balance the sweetness of the raisins and pineapple.

instructions.step: (Day-old jasmine rice gives the best texture. Cook 300g jasmine rice the day before, spread on a tray and refrigerate uncovered overnight.) Scramble eggs in hot wok. Set aside.
Stir-fry prawns. Add curry powder and rice.
Toss on high heat 3 min.
Add pineapple, cashews, raisins, soy and fish sauce.
Return eggs. Top with spring onion and coriander.

name: Thai Prawn Cakes
description: Crispy prawn cakes with kaffir lime and cucumber relish. ⭐ Pro Tip: Fold in finely sliced long beans for traditional texture and use a mortar and pestle for the curry paste integration.

instructions.step: Blend prawns with curry paste, fish sauce, kaffir lime and egg until a paste.
Shape into flat patties. Coat in cornstarch.
Pan-fry in 1cm oil until golden, 3 min per side.
Make relish: cucumber, vinegar, sugar, shallots and peanuts.
Serve prawn cakes with relish.

name: Thai Coconut Soup
description: Warming coconut broth with ginger, lemongrass and vegetables. ⭐ Pro Tip: Bruise the lemongrass and galangal before simmering to maximize aromatic release.

instructions.step: Simmer coconut milk and broth with lemongrass, galangal and kaffir lime 8 min.
Add tofu and mushrooms. Cook 5 min.
Add spinach. Wilt 1 min.
Season with lime and salt.
Serve topped with spring onion and coriander.

name: Thai Beef Noodle Soup
description: Rich beef broth with rice noodles, brisket and Thai spices. ⭐ Pro Tip: Braise the beef for 3 hours and finish with a house-made chili vinegar and fried garlic oil for sensory elevation.

instructions.step: Simmer beef in broth with cinnamon and star anise 25 min.
Season with fish sauce, soy and palm sugar.
Cook rice noodles per packet. Drain.
Slice beef.
Assemble bowls with noodles, beef and broth.
Top with bean sprouts, spring onion, Thai basil and lime.

name: Banana Roti
description: Flaky Thai street-food pancake with banana, condensed milk and egg. ⭐ Pro Tip: Finish with a sprinkle of fleur de sel to balance the cloying sweetness of the condensed milk.

instructions.step: Mix flour, water, salt and 2 tbsp oil into smooth dough. Rest 1 hour.
Divide into 4. Stretch dough paper thin on oiled surface.
Cook on hot buttered griddle.
Crack egg and sliced banana onto dough. Fold into envelope.
Fry until golden on both sides.
Drizzle condensed milk. Serve immediately.

name: Thai Basil Omelette
description: Thai street-food omelette - crispy edges, soft center, holy basil and chilli. ⭐ Pro Tip: Incorporate a splash of lime juice to cut the fat.

instructions.step: Beat eggs lightly.
Fry garlic and chilli in plenty of oil until just golden.
Pour in eggs. Do not stir. Let edges crisp up 2 min.
Add basil. Fold gently.
Season with fish sauce and oyster sauce. Serve over jasmine rice.

name: Gaeng Panang
description: Rich, dry Panang curry with coconut cream, kaffir lime and peanuts. ⭐ Pro Tip: Substitute the peanut butter with freshly toasted, crushed peanuts for a superior mouthfeel.

instructions.step: Fry Panang paste in thick coconut cream until oil rises, 3 min.
Add beef. Stir-fry 3 min.
Add remaining coconut cream and kaffir lime.
Simmer until sauce is thick, 12 min.
Stir in peanut butter. Season with fish sauce and palm sugar.
Top with kaffir lime strips and chilli. Serve with jasmine rice.

name: Thai Tofu Mango Salad
description: Crispy tofu salad with mango, cucumber and tangy lime dressing. ⭐ Pro Tip: Finish with toasted rice powder for a 5-star texture and smoky aroma.

instructions.step: Press and cube tofu. Pan-fry until golden.
Julienne mango, cucumber and carrot.
Make dressing: lime, soy, sesame oil, honey and chilli.
Toss all vegetables with herbs and tofu.
Drizzle dressing. Top with peanuts.

name: Kanom Krok
description: Crispy coconut rice pudding cups - Thai street-food dessert. ⭐ Pro Tip: Add a small amount of limestone water to the base batter to ensure a shatteringly crisp exterior that stays firm longer.

instructions.step: Mix rice flour, tapioca, half the coconut milk and salt into savory batter.
Mix remaining coconut milk with sugar for sweet topping.
Heat kanom krok pan. Oil each cup.
Fill halfway with savory batter. Pour sweet topping to fill.
Add a few spring onion or corn pieces.
Cover. Cook 5 min until edges are crispy.
Scoop out with spoon. Serve immediately.

name: Thai Green Mango Salad
description: Green mango salad with dried shrimp, peanuts and lime dressing. ⭐ Pro Tip: Toast dried shrimp and peanuts to intensify flavor and ensure a crisp, five-star texture.

instructions.step: Julienne green mango.
Pound dried shrimp coarsely in mortar with chilli and shallots.
Mix fish sauce, lime and palm sugar.
Combine mango, shrimp mixture and dressing.
Top with peanuts and coriander.

name: Pad Woon Sen
description: Stir-fried glass noodles with egg, vegetables and oyster sauce. ⭐ Pro Tip: Deglaze the wok with a splash of light stock to emulsify the sauces and coat the noodles evenly.

instructions.step: Soak glass noodles in warm water 10 min. Drain.
Stir-fry garlic in hot wok. Add chicken. Cook 3 min.
Push aside. Scramble eggs in center.
Add noodles, carrot and celery. Toss on high heat.
Season with oyster sauce, soy and fish sauce.
Top with spring onion.

name: Kanom Jeen
description: Thai rice vermicelli with coconut curry sauce and fresh herbs. ⭐ Pro Tip: Whisk in pounded white fish to thicken the gravy and provide a lean protein boost.

instructions.step: Cook vermicelli. Rinse under cold water.
Spoon the thick cream from the top of the coconut milk into a hot pan. Fry curry paste in it 2 min.
Add remaining coconut milk. Season with fish sauce and palm sugar.
Simmer 12 min.
Serve noodles topped with sauce, bean sprouts, long beans, basil and lime.
Halved boiled eggs on the side.

name: Chicken Tikka Masala
description: Marinated grilled chicken in a rich, spiced tomato and cream sauce. ⭐ Pro Tip: Add toasted Kasuri Methi at the finish for an authentic aromatic punch.

instructions.step: Mix yoghurt and half the spices. Marinate chicken 2 hours.
Grill chicken until charred. Rest, chop.
Saute onion, garlic and ginger in butter until golden.
Add remaining spices and tomatoes. Simmer 15 min.
Blend sauce smooth. Return chicken and add cream.
Simmer 5 min. Serve with naan or rice.

name: Dal Makhani
description: Slow-simmered black lentils with butter, cream and warming spices. ⭐ Pro Tip: Incorporate dried fenugreek leaves and a charcoal smoke finish to elevate the flavor profile.

instructions.step: Soak lentils and beans overnight. Boil 40 min until tender.
Saute onion, garlic and ginger in butter until golden.
Add spices and tomato puree. Cook 3 min.
Add lentils and beans. Simmer on very low heat 60 min, stirring often.
Stir in cream and butter. Serve with naan.

name: Chicken Biryani
description: Aromatic layered rice with slow-cooked chicken, fried onion and saffron. ⭐ Pro Tip: Replace some ghee with a splash of rose water for a floral finish and serve with a fiber-rich side salad.

instructions.step: Marinate chicken in yoghurt and spices 2 hours.
Fry onions in ghee until deep golden and crispy.
Cook marinated chicken 15 min.
Parboil rice 6 min. Drain.
Layer rice and chicken. Top with saffron milk, fried onions and mint. Seal.
Dum cook on very low heat 30 min.

name: Saag Paneer
description: Creamy spinach curry with fried cubes of fresh Indian cheese. ⭐ Pro Tip: Omit tomatoes for a traditional green profile and add a splash of lemon juice to cut the richness.

instructions.step: Fry paneer cubes in ghee until golden. Set aside.
Saute onion, garlic and ginger in same pan.
Add tomatoes and spices. Cook 5 min.
Wilt spinach. Blend roughly.
Add paneer and cream. Simmer 5 min.

name: Butter Chicken
description: Tender chicken in a rich tomato, butter and cream sauce. ⭐ Pro Tip: Emulsify chilled butter at the finish for a high-gloss sheen and richer mouthfeel.

instructions.step: Marinate chicken in yoghurt and spices 1 hour.
Grill or pan-cook chicken until charred.
Saute onion, garlic and ginger in butter.
Add tomatoes and spices. Simmer 15 min. Blend smooth.
Add chicken, cream, honey and fenugreek. Simmer 5 min.

name: Chana Masala
description: Spiced chickpea curry with tomato, ginger and amchur. ⭐ Pro Tip: Deglaze the onions with small splashes of water to intensify the Maillard reaction without excess oil.

instructions.step: Fry cumin seeds in oil until they pop.
Add onion, garlic and ginger. Cook until golden.
Add tomatoes and all spices. Cook 8 min.
Add chickpeas and 150ml water. Simmer 12 min.
Finish with amchur. Garnish with coriander.

name: Lamb Rogan Josh
description: Kashmiri slow-cooked lamb in aromatic spices with yoghurt base. ⭐ Pro Tip: Finish with a touch of saffron-water and fresh coriander for a restaurant-grade presentation.

instructions.step: Brown lamb in batches in ghee.
Saute onion, garlic, ginger and whole spices.
Add ground spices and yoghurt. Cook 5 min.
Return lamb. Add 200ml water. Cover and braise 55 min.
Serve with basmati rice and naan.

name: Aloo Gobi
description: Dry-spiced potato and cauliflower curry with cumin and turmeric. ⭐ Pro Tip: Sear cauliflower and potatoes individually at high heat before combining to ensure texture and Maillard depth.

instructions.step: Heat oil. Add cumin seeds until popping.
Add onion, garlic and ginger. Cook 5 min.
Add spices, potato and cauliflower. Stir well.
Cover. Cook 20 min on medium heat until tender.
Garnish with coriander and chilli.

name: Palak Dal
description: Yellow lentils and spinach with mustard seed and ginger tarka. ⭐ Pro Tip: Replace neutral oil with grass-fed ghee and finish with a squeeze of fresh lime to brighten the earthy lentils.

instructions.step: Boil lentils with turmeric until soft, 20 min.
Heat oil. Pop mustard and cumin seeds.
Add onion, garlic and ginger. Cook 5 min.
Add spinach and chilli. Wilt.
Combine with lentils. Top with tarka and coriander.

name: Samosa
description: Crispy fried pastry filled with spiced potato and peas. ⭐ Pro Tip: Add carom seeds to the dough and toast whole cumin before adding the filling.

instructions.step: Mix flour, ghee and water into stiff dough. Rest 30 min.
Boil and mash potatoes. Mix with peas, spices, chilli and coriander.
Divide dough. Roll and cut into circles. Fill and seal into cones.
Fry at 170C until golden, 6 min.

name: Paneer Tikka
description: Marinated paneer grilled with peppers and onion on skewers. ⭐ Pro Tip: Add roasted besan to the marinade for a professional crust and better spice adhesion.

instructions.step: Mix yoghurt, spices and lemon. Coat paneer and vegetables. Marinate 1 hour.
Thread onto skewers alternating paneer and vegetables.
Grill on high heat 10-12 min turning regularly.
Serve with green chutney and sliced onion.

name: Lamb Keema
description: Spiced minced lamb with peas and warming spices - quick and satisfying. ⭐ Pro Tip: Implement a 'tadka' start by blooming whole spices in ghee, and finish with a squeeze of lime and julienned ginger for acidity.

instructions.step: Brown lamb in hot pan, breaking up. Drain excess fat.
Add onion, garlic and ginger. Cook 5 min.
Add spices and tomatoes. Simmer 12 min.
Stir in peas. Cook 5 min.
Garnish with coriander. Serve with roti or rice.

name: Bhel Puri
description: Mumbai street food - puffed rice with chutneys, onion and coriander. ⭐ Pro Tip: Fold in chilled, diced boiled potatoes and pomegranate arils for structural variety and bright acidity.

instructions.step: Mix puffed rice, sev, diced onion, tomato and coriander.
Add both chutneys, chaat masala and lemon juice.
Toss quickly - must be served within 2 minutes or it goes soggy.
Top with more sev and chilli.

name: Chole Bhature
description: Spiced chickpeas served with deep-fried puffy bread. ⭐ Pro Tip: Infuse chickpeas with tea leaves and amchur for authentic color and tang.

instructions.step: Make bhature dough: flour, yoghurt, salt. Knead. Rest 1 hour.
Saute onion, garlic, ginger. Add tomatoes and spices. Cook 10 min.
Add chickpeas and 200ml water. Simmer 15 min.
Divide dough into 8. Roll round.
Deep fry at 180C until puffed and golden, 2 min.
Serve hot with chole and pickled onion.

name: Malai Kofta
description: Fried paneer and potato dumplings in a rich cashew and cream gravy. ⭐ Pro Tip: Double-strain the sauce for a velvet finish and add Kasuri Methi for aromatic depth.

instructions.step: Mash potato and paneer. Form into balls. Fry at 170C until golden.
Blend cashews and cream to smooth paste.
Saute onion, garlic, ginger. Add tomatoes and spices. Cook 10 min.
Add cashew cream. Simmer 8 min.
Add kofta gently. Serve with rice or naan.

name: Pav Bhaji
description: Mumbai street-food mashed spiced vegetables served with buttery bread rolls. ⭐ Pro Tip: Garnish with micro-coriander and pickled red onions to elevate the aesthetic and acid profile.

instructions.step: Boil potato, cauliflower and peas until very soft. Mash.
Saute onion and garlic in butter until golden.
Add tomatoes and pav bhaji masala. Cook 8 min.
Add mashed vegetables. Mash together. Simmer 5 min.
Toast rolls in butter. Serve bhaji topped with butter, coriander and lemon.

name: Masala Chai
description: Spiced Indian milk tea brewed with cardamom, ginger and cinnamon. ⭐ Pro Tip: Halve the sugar and introduce a pinch of sea salt to brighten the cardamom.

instructions.step: Bruise cardamom pods. Simmer water with spices 3 min.
Add tea. Simmer 2 min.
Add milk and sugar. Bring to vigorous boil, then reduce.
Simmer 3 min. Strain and serve.

name: Gulab Jamun
description: Soft milk-powder dumplings soaked in rose and cardamom syrup. ⭐ Pro Tip: Garnish with 24k gold leaf and serve with a cold, unsweetened saffron rabri to cut through the intense sweetness.

instructions.step: Make syrup: boil sugar with 400ml water, cardamom and rose water 8 min.
Mix milk powder, flour, baking powder and ghee. Add milk to form soft dough.
Roll into 12 balls. Fry at 160C turning gently until golden brown, 6 min.
Immediately place in warm syrup.
Soak 30 min before serving.

name: Dosa with Sambar
description: Crispy fermented rice and lentil crepes with spiced lentil soup. ⭐ Pro Tip: Incorporate fenugreek seeds into the soak to improve batter elasticity and glycemic response.

instructions.step: Make the dosa batter: soak 200g parboiled rice and 50g urad dal separately for 6 hrs. Blend each smooth. Mix together, add 1 tsp salt. Ferment at room temperature overnight until bubbly. Or use store-bought dosa batter.
Cook dal until soft. Add tomatoes, tamarind and sambar powder. Simmer 15 min.
Make tarka: pop mustard seeds in oil with curry leaves.
Pour tarka into sambar.
Heat flat pan. Pour ladle of dosa batter. Spread thin. Cook until crispy, 3 min.
Fold. Serve with sambar and coconut chutney.

name: Tandoori Prawns
description: Smoky charred prawns in yoghurt, tandoori spice and lemon. ⭐ Pro Tip: Upgrade to jumbo U-10 prawns and marinate in mustard oil for an authentic, pungent smoky finish.

instructions.step: Mix yoghurt, tandoori masala, garlic, ginger and lemon. Marinate prawns 30 min.
Thread onto skewers.
Grill on highest heat 3 min per side until charred.
Sprinkle chaat masala and coriander. Serve with lemon.

name: Semolina Halwa
description: Semolina halwa with cardamom, saffron and cashews. ⭐ Pro Tip: Increase ghee for a professional 'sheen' and garnish with silver leaf and toasted pistachios for visual impact.

instructions.step: Dissolve saffron in warm milk.
Toast cashews in ghee. Add semolina. Roast until golden, 8 min.
Carefully add hot water - it will splutter. Stir vigorously.
Add sugar, saffron milk and cardamom. Stir until thick.
Fold in raisins. Rest 2 min.

name: Cucumber Raita
description: Cooling yoghurt with cucumber, cumin and fresh herbs. ⭐ Pro Tip: Finish with a drizzle of tempered mustard oil and fresh pomegranate seeds for textural contrast and visual flair.

instructions.step: Toast cumin seeds in dry pan until fragrant. Cool. Crush.
Grate cucumber. Squeeze out liquid.
Mix yoghurt, cucumber, cumin, mint and coriander.
Season with salt, sugar and chilli powder.
Chill 30 min before serving.

name: Bhindi Masala
description: Stir-fried okra with onion, tomato and spices - crispy, not slimy. ⭐ Pro Tip: Switch to cold-pressed mustard oil for a traditional pungent depth.

instructions.step: Wash and dry okra. Cut into 2cm pieces.
Fry okra in oil without stirring until slightly crispy, 8 min.
Add cumin, onion, garlic and ginger. Cook 5 min.
Add tomatoes and spices. Cook 5 min.
Top with amchur and coriander.

name: Dum Aloo
description: Baby potatoes in a tangy, spiced yoghurt and tomato gravy. ⭐ Pro Tip: Introduce a 'Dhungar' smoking technique with hot charcoal and ghee to provide signature depth.

instructions.step: Prick and fry potatoes until golden. Set aside.
Saute onion, garlic and ginger.
Add tomatoes and spices. Cook 8 min.
Whisk yoghurt. Add off heat. Return to low heat.
Add potatoes. Cover and simmer 15 min.
Garnish with coriander.

name: Mutter Paneer
description: Peas and paneer in a spiced onion-tomato gravy. ⭐ Pro Tip: Incorporate crushed kasuri methi at the finish for essential floral notes and a signature restaurant aroma.

instructions.step: Pan-fry paneer cubes until golden. Set aside.
Saute onion, garlic and ginger until deep golden.
Add tomatoes and spices. Cook 8 min.
Add paneer and peas. Simmer 8 min.
Finish with cream and coriander.

name: Seekh Kebab
description: Spiced minced chicken grilled on skewers. ⭐ Pro Tip: Introduce smoked paprika or a charcoal 'dhungar' technique to replicate authentic Tandoor depth.

instructions.step: Blend onion, garlic, ginger and chilli. Squeeze out excess water.
Mix with chicken, spices, coriander and egg.
Wrap around flat metal skewers. Chill 30 min.
Grill 12 min turning regularly.
Serve with naan, raita and sliced onion.

name: Mango Lassi
description: Chilled yoghurt and mango drink with cardamom. ⭐ Pro Tip: Replace sugar with honey or jaggery to elevate the fruit's natural profile.

instructions.step: Grind cardamom seeds finely.
Blend yoghurt, mango, water, sugar, cardamom and ice until frothy.
Pour into chilled glasses.
A pinch of rose water on top is optional.

name: Rice Kheer
description: Slow-cooked rice pudding with saffron, cardamom and pistachios. ⭐ Pro Tip: Consider reducing the milk further for a thicker, rabri-style finish.

instructions.step: Soak rice 30 min. Drain.
Bring milk to boil. Add rice. Simmer 30 min stirring frequently.
Add sugar, saffron and cardamom. Cook 8 min.
Stir in rose water.
Serve warm or chilled, topped with pistachios and almonds.

name: Paneer Bhurji
description: Scrambled paneer with tomatoes, onion and spices. ⭐ Pro Tip: Substitute oil with ghee and finish with Kasuri Methi and lemon juice for aromatic complexity.

instructions.step: Heat oil. Pop cumin seeds.
Add onion, garlic, ginger and chilli. Cook 5 min.
Add tomatoes and spices. Cook 5 min.
Crumble paneer in. Stir on high heat 3 min.
Garnish with coriander. Serve with roti or toast.

name: Aloo Paratha
description: Flaky whole wheat flatbread stuffed with spiced mashed potato. ⭐ Pro Tip: Add a squeeze of lemon or pomegranate powder to the filling to brighten the palate.

instructions.step: Mix flour, salt and water into soft dough. Rest 20 min.
Boil potatoes. Mash with chilli, cumin, garam masala, ginger and coriander.
Divide dough. Flatten. Fill with potato. Seal. Roll out gently.
Cook on tawa with ghee until golden spots appear, 3 min per side.
Serve with cold yoghurt and pickle.

name: Classic Smash Burger
description: Juicy smash burger with American cheese, pickles and secret sauce. ⭐ Pro Tip: Switch to a dry-aged beef blend and replace processed cheese with high-melt aged cheddar.

instructions.step: Divide beef into 4 equal balls (about 120g each). Season generously with salt and pepper just before cooking.
Heat cast iron skillet on high 3 min until smoking. Place a beef ball, smash firmly with a spatula. Cook undisturbed 90 sec.
Flip. Add cheese. Cook 60 sec more.
Mix secret sauce: mayo, ketchup, mustard.
Toast buns cut-side down in the burger fat 1 min. Layer: sauce on both halves, lettuce, tomato, double smash patty, pickles and onion.

name: Mac and Cheese
description: Baked elbow pasta in a three-cheese bechamel with golden breadcrumb crust. ⭐ Pro Tip: Infuse milk with bay leaf and garlic to add aromatic complexity without additional fat.

instructions.step: Cook pasta al dente. Drain.
Make bechamel: melt butter, whisk flour, add milk, cook 5 min.
Add mustard, cayenne and 3/4 of cheeses. Stir smooth.
Combine pasta and sauce. Pour into baking dish.
Top with remaining cheese and panko.
Bake at 190C for 20 min until golden and bubbling.

name: New England Clam Chowder
description: Creamy potato and clam soup with smoky bacon. ⭐ Pro Tip: Introduce Yukon Gold potatoes for better starch integration and finish with a dash of white pepper and Sherry vinegar to brighten the pal...

instructions.step: Steam clams until open. Reserve liquor. Pick meat.
Fry bacon until crispy. Add onion and celery.
Stir in flour. Add clam liquor, milk and cream. Stir until thick.
Add potato and thyme. Simmer 15 min.
Add clam meat. Season. Serve with oyster crackers.

name: Chicken Pot Pie
description: Flaky pastry-topped pie filled with chicken, vegetables and creamy sauce. Store-bought puff pastry is standard — or make from scratch by folding butter into flour dough 6 times with resting periods between each turn. ⭐ Pro Tip: Replace breast with fat-trimmed thighs and add deglazing with white wine for acidity.

instructions.step: Cook and chop chicken. Saute onion, carrot and celery in butter.
Add flour. Stir. Add broth and cream. Simmer 8 min.
Add chicken, peas and thyme. Season.
Pour into pie dish. Cover with pastry. Crimp edges.
Brush with egg. Bake at 200C for 30 min.

name: Buffalo Wings
description: Crispy baked chicken wings tossed in buttery hot sauce. ⭐ Pro Tip: Whisk cold butter into the hot sauce off-heat to create a stable emulsion that coats wings more effectively.

instructions.step: Toss wings with baking powder, salt and garlic powder.
Bake at 220C on a rack for 40 min, flipping halfway.
Melt butter. Mix with hot sauce.
Toss hot wings in sauce.
Serve with celery sticks and blue cheese dip.

name: Pulled Pork Sandwich
description: Smoky slow-cooked pork shoulder with homemade coleslaw on a soft bun. ⭐ Pro Tip: Switch to a dry brine for 24 hours to enhance tenderness and introduce a smoke element through liquid smoke or a wood-fired oven.

instructions.step: Mix spices into rub. Coat pork generously. Refrigerate overnight.
Cook in slow cooker on low 8 hours, or 250C oven 4 hours.
Pull pork with forks. Toss in BBQ sauce.
Make coleslaw: toss cabbage and carrot with mayo, vinegar and salt.
Pile pork on buns with coleslaw.

name: Eggs Benedict
description: Poached eggs on English muffins with Canadian bacon and hollandaise. ⭐ Pro Tip: Finish with Maldon sea salt and micro-herbs rather than standard chives to elevate the visual and textural contrast.

instructions.step: Make hollandaise: whisk yolks over simmering water. Slowly whisk in melted butter. Add lemon and cayenne.
Bring a wide pan of water with vinegar to a gentle simmer.
Swirl water. Drop eggs in one at a time. Poach 3 min.
Toast muffins. Warm bacon.
Assemble: muffin, bacon, egg, hollandaise. Scatter chives.

name: Buttermilk Pancakes
description: Fluffy buttermilk pancakes with maple syrup and butter. ⭐ Pro Tip: Finish with a pinch of fleur de sel on top to contrast the maple syrup's sweetness.

instructions.step: Whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda and salt. In a separate bowl beat buttermilk, eggs, melted butter and vanilla.
Fold wet into dry - lumpy is fine.
Heat griddle to medium (about 175°C). Butter lightly. Pour ¼-cup ladlefuls. Cook until bubbles form on surface and edges look set, about 2 min.
Flip. Cook 1 min more until golden on second side. Keep warm in oven at 90°C while cooking remaining batches — usually 4–5 batches total.
Stack and serve immediately with maple syrup and cold butter.

name: Caesar Salad
description: Crispy romaine, parmesan and garlicky caesar dressing with croutons. ⭐ Pro Tip: Rub the salad bowl with a cut garlic clove for aromatic depth and use only the hearts of romaine for maximum crunch.

instructions.step: Tear bread into cubes. Toss with oil and garlic. Bake at 190C for 12 min.
Blend egg yolks, anchovies, garlic, mustard, lemon and Worcestershire.
Slowly whisk in olive oil to emulsify. Season generously.
Tear lettuce. Toss with dressing and Parmesan.
Top with croutons and extra Parmesan.

name: Chili Con Carne
description: Smoky beef chili with kidney beans, chipotle and dark beer. ⭐ Pro Tip: Finish with a splash of apple cider vinegar to brighten the heavy fats and balance the smokiness.

instructions.step: Brown beef, drain excess fat.
Saute onion and garlic. Add spices. Cook 3 min.
Add beef, tomatoes, chipotle and beer. Bring to boil.
Simmer 45 min. Add beans. Cook 10 more min.
Stir in chocolate. Season.
Serve with sour cream, cheddar and cornbread.

name: Chicken Piccata
description: Pan-seared chicken in a bright lemon-caper butter sauce — an Italian-American classic. ⭐ Pro Tip: Use cold butter added off-heat in small cubes for a silkier, more emulsified pan sauce.

instructions.step: Pound chicken breasts to even thickness between cling film. Season well and dredge in flour, shaking off excess.
Heat olive oil and half the butter in a large pan over medium-high heat. Sear chicken 3–4 min per side until golden. Remove and set aside.
Add garlic to the pan, cook 30 sec. Deglaze with white wine, scraping up the browned bits. Simmer 2 min.
Add chicken stock and lemon juice. Return chicken to the pan and simmer 5 min until cooked through.
Add capers and remaining cold butter in small cubes off the heat. Swirl the pan until the sauce is glossy and emulsified.
Garnish with fresh parsley and lemon slices. Serve with pasta, mashed potato or crusty bread.

name: French Dip Sandwich
description: Thin-sliced roast beef in a toasted hoagie dipped in rich au jus. ⭐ Pro Tip: Deglaze onions with sherry and upgrade to a 48-hour fortified veal stock.

instructions.step: (For the roast beef: season a 500g sirloin with salt and pepper, roast at 200°C for 25 min for medium-rare, rest 20 min, then slice thin. Or use quality deli roast beef.) Saute onion in butter until caramelised, 15 min.
Simmer broth with garlic, thyme and Worcestershire 10 min.
Warm roast beef in the broth briefly.
Toast rolls. Layer beef, onion and provolone.
Serve with individual bowls of au jus for dipping.

name: Buttermilk Fried Chicken
description: Deeply flavored crispy fried chicken - brined overnight in buttermilk. ⭐ Pro Tip: Finish with a drizzle of honey-butter or a dusting of celery salt to elevate the flavor profile.

instructions.step: Soak chicken in buttermilk with salt overnight.
Mix flour with paprika, garlic powder, onion, cayenne, salt and pepper.
Dredge chicken in flour. Rest 15 min. Dredge again.
Fry at 165C until golden and cooked through, 12-15 min.
Drain on wire rack. Season immediately.

name: Blueberry Muffins
description: Bakery-style tall muffins bursting with fresh blueberries. ⭐ Pro Tip: Finish with a lemon-thyme streusel or pearl sugar to provide the textural contrast expected in fine dining.

instructions.step: Mix dry ingredients: flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, lemon zest.
Whisk eggs, milk, oil and vanilla.
Fold wet into dry until just combined. Fold in blueberries.
Fill muffin cups 3/4 full.
Bake at 200C for 22 min.

name: Philly Cheesesteak
description: Thin ribeye, caramelised onion and Provolone on a toasted hoagie. ⭐ Pro Tip: Swap butter for beef tallow to enhance the flavor profile and withstand higher searing temperatures.

instructions.step: Freeze steak 30 min. Slice paper thin.
Caramelise onions in butter 12 min.
Cook beef on screaming hot griddle 3 min.
Add onions and pepper. Lay cheese over. Let melt.
Scoop into split, toasted hoagie rolls.

name: Banana Bread
description: Dense, moist banana bread with walnuts and dark brown sugar. ⭐ Pro Tip: Subsitute 50g of butter with brown butter for a deep, nutty aroma and add a tablespoon of dark rum to enhance the vanilla.

instructions.step: Mash bananas well.
Beat softened butter and sugar together until pale and fluffy. Beat in eggs one at a time, then vanilla.
Stir in bananas.
Fold in flour, baking soda, salt and cinnamon.
Fold in walnuts. Pour into loaf tin.
Bake at 175C for 55-60 min.

name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
description: Classic brown-butter chocolate chip cookies - crispy edge, chewy center. ⭐ Pro Tip: Finish with flakey sea salt to balance the sweetness and enhance the chocolate profile.

instructions.step: Brown butter until nutty. Cool 20 min.
Beat butter and sugars until combined. Add eggs and vanilla.
Fold in flour, baking soda and salt.
Stir in chocolate chips.
Chill dough 30 min.
Scoop onto tray. Bake at 190C for 11-12 min.

name: Key Lime Pie
description: Tangy, creamy Key lime filling in a graham cracker crust. ⭐ Pro Tip: Add a pinch of sea salt to the crust to balance the sugar and use mascarpone-stabilized cream for a more luxurious mouthfeel.

instructions.step: Crush crackers with butter and sugar. Press into tart tin. Bake 10 min.
Beat egg yolks until pale. Mix in condensed milk, lime juice and zest.
Pour into crust. Bake at 175C for 15 min.
Cool, then refrigerate 2 hours.
Whip cream. Top pie before serving.

name: Southern Cornbread
description: Slightly sweet, crumbly Southern cornbread baked in a cast iron skillet. ⭐ Pro Tip: Substitute standard butter with beurre noisette for deeper complexity and fold in whipped egg whites for a lighter, Michelin-standard tex...

instructions.step: Preheat cast iron skillet at 200C for 10 min.
Melt butter in the hot skillet.
Mix dry ingredients. Whisk in eggs, buttermilk and most of the butter.
Pour into hot skillet.
Bake at 200C for 22 min until golden and pulling from edges.

name: Beef Chili Dog
description: All-beef hot dogs topped with chili, cheddar and diced onion. ⭐ Pro Tip: Deglaze the chili with a dark ale or stout to add malty depth and sophisticated bitterness.

instructions.step: Brown beef with half the onion. Add cumin and chilli powder.
Add tomatoes and beans. Simmer 15 min.
Grill or boil hot dogs.
Toast buns.
Layer: hot dog, chili, raw onion, cheddar and mustard.

name: Chicken Caesar Wrap
description: Grilled chicken, crisp romaine and Parmesan in a warm flour tortilla. ⭐ Pro Tip: Subsitute commercial tortillas with spinach-infused wraps for micronutrients and use Greek yogurt to cut the dressing's fat while maintai...

instructions.step: (Store-bought flour tortillas are standard. To make from scratch: mix 240g flour, ½ tsp salt, 1 tsp baking powder, 2 tbsp lard, 140ml warm water; knead, rest 30 min, roll thin and cook on a dry griddle 1 min per side.)  Season chicken. Grill 4 min per side until cooked.
Rest and slice.
Toss romaine with dressing, Parmesan and croutons.
Warm tortillas.
Fill each with chicken and salad. Wrap and serve.

name: New York Cheesecake
description: Dense, creamy baked cheesecake with graham cracker base and sour cream top. ⭐ Pro Tip: Sieve the final batter through a chinois for a perfectly silken, void-free texture.

instructions.step: Crush crackers with butter. Press into springform tin. Bake 8 min.
Beat cream cheese and sugar until smooth. Add eggs one at a time.
Mix in sour cream, vanilla and lemon zest.
Pour into tin. Bake in water bath at 160C for 55 min.
Cool in oven 1 hour. Refrigerate overnight.

name: Loaded Baked Potato
description: Baked potato loaded with sour cream, cheddar, bacon and chives. ⭐ Pro Tip: Finish with micro-chives and a pinch of Maldon to heighten visual and tactile contrast.

instructions.step: Scrub potatoes. Pierce all over. Rub with oil and salt.
Bake at 220C for 55-60 min until skin is crisp.
Fry bacon until crispy. Crumble.
Split potatoes. Fluff with fork.
Load with butter, sour cream, cheddar, bacon and chives.

name: Devilled Eggs
description: Classic party appetiser - hard-boiled eggs filled with creamy yolk and paprika. ⭐ Pro Tip: Add a high-end textural element like crispy pancetta or micro-celery to elevate the dish from picnic fare to a restaurant-grade appetizer.

instructions.step: Hard boil eggs 10 min. Cool in ice water.
Peel and halve lengthwise.
Mix yolks with mayo, mustard, vinegar, salt and hot sauce until smooth.
Pipe or spoon filling back into whites.
Dust with paprika. Garnish with chives.

name: New England Clam Bake
description: New England clam bake with lobster, corn, potatoes and chorizo. ⭐ Pro Tip: Finish with a cold-emulsified lemon-herb beurre blanc instead of plain butter to elevate the flavor profile to five-star standards.

instructions.step: Layer potatoes, chorizo, corn and onion in a large pot with white wine.
Add Old Bay and garlic. Bring to boil.
Add lobster and clams. Cover tightly.
Steam 20 min until clams open and lobster is red.
Pour into large serving tray. Drizzle melted butter and parsley.

name: Sweet Potato Pie
description: Smooth, warmly spiced sweet potato filling in a butter crust. ⭐ Pro Tip: Blind bake the pastry at 190C before filling to ensure crispness.

instructions.step: Make pastry: rub butter into flour. Add 4 tbsp ice water. Rest 30 min.
Bake sweet potatoes at 200C until soft, 45 min.
Scoop flesh. Blend with sugars, eggs, milk, spices and vanilla until smooth.
Line pie dish with pastry. Fill.
Bake at 180C for 45 min.

name: Reuben Sandwich
description: Corned beef, sauerkraut and Swiss on toasted rye with Russian dressing. ⭐ Pro Tip: Use a weighted press to achieve a perfectly uniform, shatter-crisp Maillard reaction on the crust.

instructions.step: Spread Russian dressing on bread slices.
Layer corned beef, sauerkraut and Swiss cheese.
Butter outsides of sandwich.
Grill in pan or press in panini press 4 min per side.

name: Biscuits and Gravy
description: Fluffy Southern biscuits topped with creamy sausage gravy. ⭐ Pro Tip: Grate frozen butter into the flour for maximum lift and incorporate toasted fennel seeds into the sausage.

instructions.step: Make biscuits: rub butter into flour and baking powder. Add buttermilk. Pat 2cm thick. Cut rounds.
Bake at 220C for 14 min.
Brown sausage, breaking into pieces.
Sprinkle flour over sausage. Whisk in milk slowly. Simmer 5 min.
Season generously with black pepper. Split biscuits. Smother with gravy.

name: Cobb Salad
description: Classic American salad with chicken, bacon, egg, avocado and blue cheese. ⭐ Pro Tip: Emulsify the dressing more aggressively with an immersion blender for a professional, clinging consistency-clinging finish.

instructions.step: Grill chicken. Cool and dice.
Fry bacon until crispy. Hard boil eggs.
Make dressing: whisk olive oil, vinegar and mustard.
Arrange lettuce in bowl. Row each topping across: chicken, bacon, halved eggs, avocado, tomatoes and blue cheese.
Drizzle dressing. Scatter chives.

name: Linguine with Clams
description: Linguine with clams, white wine, garlic and parsley. ⭐ Pro Tip: Introduce toasted breadcrumbs or Bottarga for textural contrast and an umami boost typical of Michelin-level plating.

instructions.step: Scrub clams. Discard any open ones.
Cook linguine al dente. Reserve 200ml pasta water.
Saute garlic and chilli in olive oil.
Add white wine and clams. Cover and steam 5 min until all open.
Add pasta and pasta water. Toss with butter.
Finish with parsley and lemon.

name: Texas Brisket
description: Slow-smoked whole packer brisket with bark and smoke ring. ⭐ Pro Tip: Swap wood chips for seasoned oak splits to achieve a cleaner, thinner blue smoke.

instructions.step: Trim brisket to 1cm fat cap. Combine salt, pepper, garlic and onion powder.
Coat brisket generously. Rest 1 hour at room temp.
Smoke at 110C fat side down for 8 hours, adding wood chips every hour.
Wrap in butcher paper at 74C internal. Continue until 96C internal, about 2-3 more hours.
Rest wrapped in cooler 1-2 hours.
Slice point against grain. Slice flat against grain. Serve with pickles and onion.

name: St Louis Ribs
description: Slow-smoked pork ribs with dry rub and finishing BBQ glaze. ⭐ Pro Tip: Subsitute 50% of the sugar with kosher salt and finish with a spray of apple cider vinegar and bourbon for refined acidity.

instructions.step: Remove membrane from ribs. Mix dry rub ingredients. Apply all over.
Smoke at 120C for 3 hours.
Wrap in foil with apple juice. Cook 1 more hour.
Unwrap. Glaze with BBQ sauce. Cook 30 min until sticky.
Rest 10 min. Slice between bones.

name: Smoked Chicken
description: Whole chicken rubbed with garlic butter and smoked until juicy. ⭐ Pro Tip: Pull the bird at 68C to allow carryover heat to finish the cook without drying the fibers.

instructions.step: Mix softened butter with garlic, paprika, salt and thyme.
Loosen skin. Push butter under skin and over outside.
Stuff cavity with lemon halves.
Smoke at 120C for 3 hours until breast reads 74C.
Rest 15 min. Carve.

name: Memphis Pulled Pork
description: Pulled pork shoulder with Memphis-style dry rub and vinegar slaw. ⭐ Pro Tip: Always rest the meat for at least one hour to ensure peak succulence and fat integration.

instructions.step: Combine all dry rub ingredients. Rub all over pork shoulder generously.
Refrigerate overnight.
Smoke at 115C for 6 hours.
Spritz with apple cider vinegar every hour.
Pull at 93C internal. Shred.
Serve on buns with vinegar slaw.

name: Smoked Salmon
description: Dry-brined salmon hot smoked with alder wood until flaky and rich. ⭐ Pro Tip: Reduce sugar by 30% and pull the fish at 52C for a sophisticated, translucent flake.

instructions.step: Mix brine: brown sugar, salt, pepper, garlic and lemon zest.
Coat salmon. Refrigerate 4 hours.
Rinse brine. Pat dry. Air-dry 30 min until tacky pellicle forms.
Smoke at 80C for 2-3 hours until internal temp is 62C.
Cool completely. Flake over salads or pasta, or serve with cream cheese, capers and crackers.

name: BBQ Corn on the Cob
description: Charred corn with smoked chilli butter and lime. ⭐ Pro Tip: Upgrade to brown butter and finish with smoked Maldon salt for a sophisticated flavor profile.

instructions.step: Mix softened butter with paprika, chilli, garlic and salt.
Husk corn. Grill directly on BBQ, turning, 12-15 min.
Spread butter over hot corn.
Squeeze lime. Garnish with chives.

name: Carolina Vinegar Sauce
description: Eastern Carolina-style thin tangy vinegar BBQ sauce. ⭐ Pro Tip: Incorporate a dash of dry mustard for emulsification and a splash of Worcestershire to provide a sophisticated savory backbone.

instructions.step: Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
Simmer 5 min until sugar dissolves.
Cool completely before using.
Excellent on pulled pork - drizzle over meat not bun.

name: Smoke-Roasted Beets
description: Whole beets slow-roasted in the smoker with balsamic and thyme. ⭐ Pro Tip: Discard the foil for the final thirty minutes to develop a lacquered, smoky exterior.

instructions.step: Toss beets with oil, balsamic, thyme, garlic, salt and pepper.
Wrap in foil parcels.
Place in smoker at 135C for 90 min until tender.
Unwrap. Dress with orange zest.
Serve warm or at room temp.

name: BBQ Baked Beans
description: Slow-baked navy beans with smoked paprika, molasses and chipotle. ⭐ Pro Tip: Reduce brown sugar and add a splash of dark espresso for a more complex, bitter-sweet profile.

instructions.step: Soak beans overnight. Boil 40 min until just tender.
Fry bacon and onion. Add garlic and all remaining ingredients plus 300ml bean cooking water.
Combine with beans in Dutch oven.
Bake covered at 160C for 1 hour.
Uncover. Bake 20 more min to thicken.

name: Beef Burnt Ends
description: Smoked brisket point cubes sauced and returned to the smoker until sticky. ⭐ Pro Tip: Rest the whole point for 45 minutes before cubing to ensure maximum cellular hydration.

instructions.step: Rub brisket point generously. Smoke at 110C until 76C internal, about 5 hours.
Cube into 4cm pieces.
Toss cubes with BBQ sauce, brown sugar, butter and apple juice.
Place back in smoker at 135C in a foil tray for 1 hour.
Sauce will reduce and sticky bark will form. Serve hot.

name: Kansas City Ribs
description: Baby back ribs with Kansas City-style sweet, thick BBQ glaze. ⭐ Pro Tip: Reduce the brown sugar in the rub and add acidity through a spritz during the cook.

instructions.step: Remove membrane. Apply dry rub all over. Rest 1 hour.
Make Kansas City sauce: simmer ketchup, molasses, vinegar, Worcestershire, remaining brown sugar and spices 10 min.
Smoke ribs at 120C for 3 hours.
Glaze with sauce. Smoke 30 more min.
Rest 10 min. Slice.

name: Whole Smoked Turkey
description: Dry-brined whole turkey smoked with pecan wood. ⭐ Pro Tip: Inject the breast with herb-infused clarified butter to guarantee moisture during the long smoke.

instructions.step: Mix salt, sugar and spices. Rub all over turkey including under skin. Refrigerate 24 hours.
Remove from fridge 1 hour before cooking.
Smoke at 135C for 4 hours, adding wood every hour.
Internal breast temp should reach 74C.
Rest 30 min under foil. Carve.

name: BBQ Cauliflower Steaks
description: Thick cauliflower steaks grilled with smoky chipotle and lime marinade. ⭐ Pro Tip: Add a splash of maple syrup for better caramelization and serve with a tahini-based crema for satiety.

instructions.step: Slice cauliflower into 3cm steaks from the center.
Mix chipotle, oil, lime, paprika, garlic and salt.
Coat steaks in marinade. Rest 30 min.
Grill on high heat 6-7 min per side until charred and tender.
Top with coriander and pomegranate seeds.

name: Smoked Pork Belly
description: Smoked pork belly with crispy bark served sliced with pickles. ⭐ Pro Tip: Introduce toasted star anise to the rub and use a mustard binder for superior bark adhesion.

instructions.step: Score skin. Rub all surfaces with dry rub. Refrigerate overnight.
Smoke skin-side up at 120C for 3 hours, spritzing with vinegar hourly.
Rest 15 min. Slice 1cm thick.
Serve with pickled vegetables and soft rolls.

name: Chipotle BBQ Sauce
description: Smoky chipotle BBQ sauce with molasses and apple cider vinegar. ⭐ Pro Tip: Cut the brown sugar by half to balance the glycemic impact and highlight the smoke.

instructions.step: Blend chipotle smooth.
Combine all ingredients in saucepan.
Simmer 15 min until sauce thickens slightly.
Taste and adjust sweetness, acid and heat.
Cool. Store refrigerated up to 2 weeks.

name: Grilled Lobster
description: Lobster tails split and grilled with garlic herb butter. ⭐ Pro Tip: Shorten cooking time to 6 minutes for optimal succulence and add a splash of dry vermouth to the butter for depth.

instructions.step: Split tails lengthwise. Pull meat up over shell.
Mix softened butter with garlic, parsley, paprika, salt and pepper.
Spread butter on exposed meat.
Grill cut-side up on medium-high heat 8-10 min until opaque and lightly charred.
Squeeze lemon. Serve with remaining butter.

name: Hickory Smoked Sausage
description: Whole hickory-smoked sausage links served with mustard and pickled onion. ⭐ Pro Tip: Maintain skin integrity by finishing at 145C and using a water pan for moisture.

instructions.step: Cold-smoke sausages at 80C with hickory for 45 min.
Raise to 160C and cook 15 more min until skins split slightly.
Make quick pickled onion: slice onion, cover with vinegar and sugar 20 min.
Serve sausages split in rolls with yellow mustard and pickled onion.

name: Smoked Mac and Cheese
description: Creamy four-cheese macaroni smoked in a cast iron skillet. ⭐ Pro Tip: Infuse the milk with shallots and peppercorns for a more sophisticated aromatic base.

instructions.step: Cook pasta al dente. Drain.
Make bechamel. Add cheeses until smooth.
Combine pasta and sauce. Pour into cast iron skillet.
Top with panko and paprika.
Place in smoker at 135C for 45 min until golden and smoky.

name: Jamaican Jerk Chicken
description: Scotch bonnet-marinated chicken grilled over allspice wood. ⭐ Pro Tip: Use pimento wood chips to achieve authentic smokiness and replace soy with coconut aminos to reduce sodium.

instructions.step: Blend all marinade ingredients until smooth.
Score chicken deeply. Coat in jerk marinade. Marinate overnight.
Grill on medium heat turning and basting, 40-45 min until cooked through.
Rest 5 min.
Serve with rice and peas and festival dumplings.

name: Alabama White Sauce
description: Alabama-style white BBQ sauce - creamy, tangy, peppery. ⭐ Pro Tip: Use coarse-ground smoked black pepper to reinforce the barbecue's wood-fired character.

instructions.step: Whisk all ingredients together.
Taste and adjust seasoning.
Refrigerate at least 1 hour before serving.
Excellent as dipping sauce for smoked chicken or drizzled over pulled pork.

name: Smoked Brisket Tacos
description: Leftover smoked brisket in warm tortillas with salsa and pickled jalapeños. ⭐ Pro Tip: Swap sour cream for a fermented lime-radish crema to elevate the acidity.

instructions.step: (For the smoked brisket: see the full Smoked Brisket recipe in the BBQ catalog — smoke a full brisket flat at 120°C for 10–12 hrs. These tacos are the perfect use for leftovers.) Warm brisket in foil with a splash of beef broth.
Warm tortillas directly on flame.
Slice or chop brisket.
Top tortillas with brisket, diced onion and jalapeños.
Add salsa, coriander, avocado and sour cream. Squeeze lime.

name: Peach BBQ Glazed Ham
description: Whole smoked ham glazed with peach preserves and brown sugar. ⭐ Pro Tip: Finish with a high-heat sear to create a shatteringly crisp exterior while maintaining a succulent interior.

instructions.step: Score ham in diamond pattern 1cm deep.
Mix peach preserves, brown sugar, mustard, vinegar, cayenne and spices.
Place ham in roasting tin. Brush 1/3 of glaze.
Bake at 160C for 90 min, glazing every 30 min.
Rest 15 min.
Slice and serve with remaining warm glaze.

name: Smoked Beef Ribs
description: Massive beef short ribs - smoked 6 hours until the meat pulls from the bone. ⭐ Pro Tip: Enhance the final presentation with a high-quality finishing salt and pickled red onions to balance the richness.

instructions.step: Trim excess fat. Apply 50/50 salt and pepper rub generously.
Rest at room temp 1 hour.
Smoke meat-side up at 110C for 6 hours.
Spritz with beef broth every hour.
When bark is dark and temp reads 98C, rest 1 hour in cooler.
Slice between bones. Serve with pickles and white bread.

name: Grilled Skirt Steak
description: Chimichurri-marinated skirt steak grilled over high heat. ⭐ Pro Tip: Temper the steak to room temperature before grilling to ensure even edge-to-edge doneness.

instructions.step: Blend chimichurri: parsley, oregano, garlic, vinegar, oil, chilli, salt and cumin.
Marinate steak in half the chimichurri 30 min.
Grill on highest heat 3 min per side for medium-rare.
Rest 5 min.
Slice thin across grain. Serve with remaining chimichurri.

name: Pit Boss Beans
description: Long-simmered pinto beans cooked under the brisket drippings. ⭐ Pro Tip: Replace brown sugar with blackstrap molasses for mineral complexity and a darker, glossier finish.

instructions.step: (This recipe is designed to cook under a brisket in a smoker, absorbing the drippings. Fat trimmings come from preparing a whole brisket — see Smoked Brisket in the BBQ catalog.) Soak beans overnight.
Render brisket trimmings in a cast iron Dutch oven.
Add onion and garlic. Cook 5 min.
Add all remaining ingredients and beans. Cover with water.
Place under brisket in smoker for 3 hours at 135C, absorbing drippings.
Season and serve alongside brisket.

name: Smoked Duck Legs
description: Duck legs slow-smoked with five spice and honey glaze. ⭐ Pro Tip: Flash-sear or torch the skin post-smoke for essential textural contrast.

instructions.step: Score duck skin. Mix five spice and salt. Rub over duck.
Mix honey, soy, ginger, garlic and vinegar into glaze.
Smoke duck at 120C for 2.5 hours with cherry wood.
Brush with glaze every 40 min.
Rest 10 min.
Serve with steamed bok choy and jasmine rice.

name: Smoked Trout Dip
description: Flaked smoked trout blended with cream cheese, horseradish and dill. ⭐ Pro Tip: Substitute crème fraîche for sour cream to achieve a luxurious, Michelin-standard mouthfeel.

instructions.step: Flake trout, removing all bones.
Beat cream cheese and sour cream until smooth.
Fold in trout, horseradish, dill, lemon, capers and spring onion.
Season with black pepper.
Serve with crackers or cucumber slices.

name: Honey Mustard Glazed Pork Chops
description: Thick pork chops grilled and finished with honey mustard glaze. ⭐ Pro Tip: Brine the chops for four hours in an apple-cider solution to ensure Michelin-level moisture and seasoning penetration.

instructions.step: Season chops with garlic powder, salt and pepper.
Mix honey, both mustards and vinegar.
Grill chops on high heat 4 min per side.
Move to indirect heat. Brush glaze over. Cook 5 more min.
Rest 5 min. Brush remaining glaze. Serve with rosemary.

name: Smoked Queso Dip
description: Smoky melted cheese dip with canned tomatoes and jalapeños. ⭐ Pro Tip: Incorporate fire-roasted poblanos instead of raw jalapeños to add depth and a sophisticated char.

instructions.step: Dice jalapeños, onion and garlic.
Cube cheese. Place in cast iron skillet.
Add tomatoes, jalapeños, onion, garlic, paprika and cumin.
Smoke at 175C for 25 min, stirring halfway.
Top with coriander. Serve immediately with tortilla chips.

name: Smoked Lamb Shoulder
description: Slow-smoked lamb shoulder with harissa rub - pulled at the table. ⭐ Pro Tip: Ensure the lamb reaches an internal temperature of 93C for an elite, melt-in-the-mouth texture.

instructions.step: Score lamb deeply. Mix harissa, oil, garlic, cumin and coriander.
Push marinade into cuts. Rest overnight.
Smoke at 120C for 6 hours with rosemary wood chips.
Rest 30 min wrapped in foil.
Pull apart at the table. Serve in flatbreads with tzatziki and lemon.
